title: Wasber
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Wasbers''' were a type of [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] stinging [[Insect/Legends|insect]] from [[Tenupe]]. Their poison worked quickly on [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] sized prey, making them a viable [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] tool, though it lost its effectiveness after a certain period of [[Time/Legends|time]]. The poison turned the immune system against the body making it almost impossible to stop it once it started. The fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knight]] [[Alema Rar]] used the poison of a wasber to make [[Poison dart/Legends|poison darts]], which she attempted to use against the [[Solo family/Legends|Solos]] and [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalkers]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
